text: The curious little cat sat comfortably on the old worn mat in the corner of the cozy living room.
She quickly finished her challenging homework assignment before dinner.
The big friendly dog enthusiastically chased the small frightened cat around the entire backyard.
He graciously gave her a beautiful handcrafted gift from his workshop.
The excited children played happily in the sunny park near their school.
Dedicated scientists recently discovered a fascinating new species in the remote tropical rainforest.
